creator: alexis.praga@proton.me
text:
Thanks for the fix. This morning, I got a new batch of mails with a different build error now :

===>   kitty-0.25.2_1 depends on shared library: libepoll-shim-interpose.so - not found
*** Error code 1

I could not figure out what you did in git history but is it possible this commit is missing ? https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=3fcb653641a362989362bd78322ac5e339312ae5 

(from https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=265393#c34)
